summary: First iteration E2E testing of EU AI Act Compliance Scorecard MVP. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests pass covering root, quiz classification (all 6 tiers incl. out-of-scope), persistence, DPDP findings, 402-gating, mock checkout, full report (FRIA + badge SVG), subscribe (valid + invalid). Frontend: Landing renders with Hero/HowItWorks/Testimonials/Pricing/FAQ/Footer, theme toggle flips html class light<->dark, 10-question quiz works, DPDP toggle adds 4 extra questions (counter 10 -> 14), high-risk path navigates to /results/:id with risk-badge=High-Risk & score=30, unlock opens MockCheckoutModal, pay succeeds, /report/:id shows paid banner, obligations checklist, DPDP findings, FRIA CSV download, branded PDF download (EU-AI-Act-Report-<id>.pdf), compliance badge SVG, and copy-badge-btn visible under embed tab. Newsletter subscribe posts /api/subscribe -> 200.

issues: Page <title> is the default 'Emergent | Fullstack App' in /app/frontend/public/index.html instead of a product-relevant title (e.g., 'EU AI Act Scorecard').
Console a11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent'. Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to the Radix DialogContent for WCAG compliance.

action_items: (Low) Add DialogDescription/aria-describedby to MockCheckoutModal DialogContent to silence Radix a11y warning.
(Optional) Also add a top-level `start-quiz-button` testid if referenced by any analytics spec; currently only `hero-start-quiz-btn` exists, which fulfills the primary CTA requirement.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'). Migrate to FastAPI lifespan context.
generate_badge_svg label for 'minimal' is 'AI ACT — MINIMAL RISK' but out-of-scope case also returns risk_level='minimal'; consider distinguishing scope vs minimal in the badge text for clarity.

classify_and_score: out-of-scope short-circuit (q9=no) returns risk_level='minimal' which conflicts with semantic 'out of scope'. risk_label reads 'Out of EU Scope / Minimal' but downstream obligations map uses 'minimal' key. Acceptable for MVP but worth a dedicated risk_level='out_of_scope' later.
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec (browsers reject). Configure explicit origins in production.
No rate limiting on /api/subscribe or /api/quiz/submit — easy abuse vector before launch.
test_credentials: None required (public app). Mock card 4242 4242 4242 4242 shown inside modal.
seed_data_creation: Test data inserted via API calls (TEST_* prefixed emails + quiz sessions). No manual seeds.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression test file at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers all endpoints + all 6 classification tiers + payment gating. For FE, use data-testid: hero-start-quiz-btn, quiz-option-yes/no, quiz-next-btn, quiz-submit-btn, dpdp-toggle, unlock-report-btn, checkout-pay-btn, badge-tab-embed, copy-badge-btn, download-pdf-btn, download-fria-btn, subscribe-form/input/btn, theme-toggle, testimonials-section. Note: copy-badge-btn only renders under the 'embed' tab of the compliance badge section. High-risk path requires q3=yes, q9=yes. Out-of-scope is q9=no.
